text:
On the final day of competition at the 2024 U.S. Olympic Gymnastics Trials, Simone Biles secured a spot on her third Olympic team by winning the all-around title. Here’s who will join Biles in Paris.

The U.S. Gymnastics athletes headed to the2024 Olympicsare set.

Following the conclusion of the men's trials on Saturday, the women's side wrapped things up Sunday night, which sawSimone Bilesdominate thanks to stellar floor routines.

Stream NBC 5 for free, 24/7, wherever you are.

Also coming through from the women's side was rising 23-year-old starJordan Chiles, who was a silver medalist at theTokyo Games.

Here's what to know about the men's and women's U.S. Gymnastics rosters for Paris:

Along with Biles and Chiles, here's who made the cut:

Watch all the action from the Paris Olympic and Paralympic Games live on Peacock

The men's side is led by Brody Malone, who has experience from the Tokyo Games. The rest of the roster will make their Olympic debuts. Here's the list:

Gymnastic eventsin Paris will run from July 27-Aug. 1 and Aug. 3-5.

Artistic gymnastics events in Paris will transpire atBercy Arena.
title: US Gymnastics roster for 2024 Olympics finalized – NBC Chicago
description: One day after the men's roster was finalized, the women's followed suit Sunday. Here are the U.S. Gymnastics athletes going to the Paris Olympics.
